name: Plain text
description: Simple reply with text only, no buttons or cards

name: Text with buttons
description: Reply with text and one or more choice buttons

name: Thinking with status
description: Typing indicator with configurable status (e.g. Looking into Slack history...)

name: Case card
description: Structured card with title and key-value fields

name: OAuth / connect card
description: Intro text plus a Block Kit–style card with accent bar, trust copy, and a primary green action (e.g. Cornerstone or SSO)

config.defaultCardBody: To provide personalized career recommendations and courses, Agentforce needs to securely link your Slack workspace with your Cornerstone account.
config.defaultCardFooter: You only need to do this once. We will never share your password.
config.defaultConnectedBody: Your account is successfully linked. Resuming your original request...
